description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a rectangular footprint, clad in light brown wood siding and featuring a flat, light-colored roof. The front facade is dominated by large, rectangular windows and a prominent garage door, suggesting an integrated garage. The house is surrounded by snow-covered evergreen trees, creating a wintry suburban setting. A light-colored driveway leads up to the garage and main entrance, which is slightly recessed and sheltered. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with large panes providing ample natural light. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with wood siding, large windows, a flat roof, and an attached garage, surrounded by snowy evergreen trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage door, and driveway flanked by snow-covered trees.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and dense cluster of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, flat roof, back wall with fewer windows, and trees on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the rear corner, side windows, and the driveway curving away from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a large garage door integrated into the facade
